name: tiktok-skills
description: 5 Claude Code and Codex skills for TikTok marketing: first 1-3 second hook scripting (spoken line plus on-screen text), caption writing under 2,200 chars with TikTok settings and hashtags, trend and sound mapping for your niche, an AI-script humanizer with pre-film audit, and weekly content planning around completion rate. Publora is the default publish layer for the rendered video.

interface.shortDescription: TikTok marketing skills for Claude Code and Codex.
interface.longDescription: A bundle of 5 TikTok marketing skills for Claude Code and Codex: 3-second hook scripting, caption and settings writing, trend and sound mapping, an AI-script humanizer with pre-film audit, and weekly content planning around completion rate.
defaultPrompt: Script a 3-second hook for my video idea.
Write the caption, hashtags, and TikTok settings.
Plan a week of TikTok content around completion rate.
